title: PlayerVaultsX
description: The ultimate multi-version vault plugin with MiniMessage support
body:
The ultimate multi-version PV plugin!

### Features * **Infinite vaults** per player * **Per-vault permissions:** `playervaults.quantity.` * **Admin commands** to see other players vaults​ * **MiniMessage formatting** (gradients, hex colors, rainbows) * Every message and vault title is **fully configurable** * **Automatic saving** on close and server shutdown * **Zero** server-side dependencies --- ### Commands & Permissions #### Commands * `/pv ` - Open a personal vault. * `/pv ` - Opens other player vault. #### Permissions * `playervaults.quantity.` - Access to vaults up to the number specified. * `playervaults.quantity.*` - Access to all vaults. * `playervaults.admin.view` - Access to other players vaults **only view**. * `playervaults.admin.edit` - Lets you edit other player vaults. --- ### Requirements * **Software:** Spigot, Paper, or any fork * **Minecraft Version:** 1.8 to 26.1 * **Java:** Java 8 or higher --- ### Configuration ```yaml messages: opening: "Opening vault #{number}" no-permission: "You don't have any vaults available" usage: "Usage: /pv {number}" invalid-number: "Please enter a valid number" vault-title: "Vault #{number}" ```
